creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: Please review and apply above patch that sets OpenGL ES as the default build option of the EFL port on FreeBSD (this is also preferred backend by the upstream). I have to rebuild it by hand on every EFL port update as OpenGL hangs screen on Enlightenment start when running on AMDGPU and that renders E/EFL unusable here (it does not occur on Intel DRM). Thanks :-)
